feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP B1 Web client does not show print layout same as SAP Client
entry.content:
Dear SAP Export,

Now I am testing the Web Client (SAP 10.0 FP2111) and I found when I preview print report on Web Client. The layout list that shows on Web Client has less than SAP Client. I did not see the layout that I wanna preview in the layout list on Web Client. 

How do I make the layout list show on Web Client same as SAP Client?

Best regards,
Siripong

entry.title: change to Chart of Accounts Template
entry.content: Hello, How do I change to Chart of Accounts Template. Company Details > Basic Initialization > Chart of Accounts Template --> CATR. But this field is read-only and I can't change it. Can you please help?

entry.title: How many user use Single SAP B1 License at same time SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

How many user use Single SAP ID at same time SAP Business One?  How can we set sap license so multiple user can use single SAP ID.

SAP ID means , User which has assigned SAP B1 license to use SAP B1

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Without Use of Forecast MRP is working fine SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Without use of Forecast , MRP is also working fine and Using Forecast MRP is also giving same result.

Why we can use forecast?  Is this compulsory to use? 

Forecast, MRP, SAP Business One

regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: HANA database Restore on MS SQL Server
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We have clouds SAP HANA and I want to restore SAP HANA to SQL Server.
Honestly I don't know where to start and which folder or files in their that I am going to use for importing.
Hopefully someone could help me.
Thanks in advance
Sajid Islam

entry.title: Dashboard develop into SAP Business One SQL
entry.content:
Dear all,

How we can start to develop the dashboard into SQL SAP Business One? What are the steps to create dashboard?

SAP Business One, SQL , Dashboard

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Use of .mdf and .ldf file, SAP Business One SQL
entry.content:
Dear all,

What is the use of .mdf file OR .ldf file into SSMS? What is the use of it?

What happened if there size are auto increased?  

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Auto increase the .ldf database size SAP Business One SQL
entry.content:
Dear all,

Auto increase the .ldf database size SAP Business One SQL?

Issue : Auto increase the database size

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: MRP for Jobworker in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,
I want to run an MRP for Jobwork where I am giving raw material to the Jobworker and receive Finished Goods. I am trying to run a scenario where  I am getting recommendations only for the purchase order of the Finished Goods from Jobworker but I also need to procure the Raw material required to make this Finished Good and make semi finished goods made inhouse that we send to the jobworker
Please help.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Understanding on Resource Capacity SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding on  Resource Capacity SAP Business One. 

What is Time per Resource Units? and Where it is used?

What is Res. Units per Time Period? and Where it is used?

How Daily Capacity Factors works? 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Attachments2 using HttpClient and C#
entry.content:
Hi. Based on 

  • Postman tool OK
  • .NET B1SLayer OK
  • .NET System.Net.Http.HttpClient Failed

Assuming that the login has been previously performed with the SAPclient object. The Attachments2 method doesn't work with HttpClient in C#. Please see:

var res = "";
var content = new MultipartContent();
var outputFile = new StreamContent(new MemoryStream(File.ReadAllBytes("C:\\Users\\Jorge\\Postman\\files\\helloworld.txt)));

outputFile.Headers.Add("Content-Disposition", $"form-data; name=\"files\"; filename=\"helloworld.txt\"");
outputFile.Headers.Add("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream");
content.Add(outputFile);
var boundary = content.Headers.ContentType!.Parameters.First(o => o.Name.Equals("boundary", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
boundary.Value = boundary.Value!.Replace("\"", string.Empty);

var response = await SAPclient.PostAsync("https://mycompany.com:50000/b1s/v1/Attachments2", content);
if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode == true && response.StatusCode == HttpStatusCode.Created)
{
Attachments2Response? resA = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<Attachments2Response>();
res = resA!.AbsoluteEntry.ToString(); 
}

The Response: StatusCode: 400, ReasonPhrase: 'Bad Request', Version: 1.1, Content: System.Net.Http.HttpConnectionResponseContent, Headers:
{
Date: Thu, 12 Sep 2024 20:46:02 GMT
Server: Apache/2.4.54 (Unix)
DataServiceVersion: 3.0
Vary: Accept-Encoding
Connection: close
Transfer-Encoding: chunked
Content-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8
}}

Why and how to fix it?

Thanks.

Jorge

entry.title: Problems with the Message Summary Alerts window
entry.content:
Hi

SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.150) FP 2102 (64-bit)

A user minimizes the Messages and Alerts window and continues working in Sap.

After a few minutes it returns to the messages and alerts window (maximize).
this one appears with a white screen.

The problem only occurs for one user (30 users on the company)

Any suggestion ?

entry.title: Query Generator
entry.content:
I am trying to write a query using query generator.  I need to display

BP Code, BP Name from OINV table and monthly total of Weight1 from INV1 table.

I can get all invoices with weight totals separately but I cannot get a total weight per month.

I also need to be able to select a date range.

Can anyone help please.

Many thanks

entry.title: AP Draft Invoices - Attachments - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working with a client and setting up an approval process for AP Invoices.

The approver has a limited license and can not open the AP Invoice screen to see the attachments.

Does anyone have a workaround that from the alert and clicking on the line, the user can see the attachments for the AP draft invoice and open the attachments?

Thanks in advance.

SAP Business One

entry.title: Can I write a stored procedure that will require the E-Mail field in the contact person tab without
entry.content: Can I write a stored procedure that will require the E-Mail field in the contact person tab without? When I enter a contact person, the stored procedure I wrote works, but if nothing is entered in that field and I add a business partner, the stored procedure does not work.

entry.title: Query to list components and unit price
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I am trying to write a query to list all the components in a production order and the unit price from the ITT1 table
The results is multiplying by the number of rows in the BOM. It maybe because there are multiple phantom part numbers in the BOM
Can someone please point me in the right direction

SELECT 
T1.[ItemCode], 
T1.[ItemName], 
T1.[PlannedQty], 
T2.[Price] 
FROM OWOR T0 
INNER JOIN WOR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] 
INNER JOIN ITT1 T2 ON T1.[ItemCode] = T2.[Code] 
WHERE T0.[DocNum]  = [%0]

Regards

Rah

entry.title: When come to an end, the unknown task occurred during the SAP B1 version upgrade..
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

I've been upgrading the sap b1 on mssql version again, from 8.81 to 10.0, since 5:00 AM yesterday.

When come to an end, there is unknown task working. I don't know what this task doing but I see that it replicated the primary data file of the database with difference extension, The file name format is [database name].mdf_MSSQL_DBCC12.

 

this is very very annoying and not professional. It will take so much time. It is been 29 hours and the upgrade has not finished yet.

What is this task doing now ? does sap ever know this ? The customer is really wasting time and the lead will not choose sap b1 instead they will buy another erp product.

when I open the sap b1 choose company window, the company database is upgraded

can the user use sap b1 now ? have anyone experienced this unknown task ? how long was it took place ?

Rgds,

Jimmy

entry.title: Goods issue with wrong unit cost.
entry.content:
Due to wrong foreign exchange rate, my items in the warehouse were posted by wrong item cost. i.e. the item cost escalated by 1000's.  However, the quantity in either GI or GR are correct. Due to this issue, there has been a significant impact on my GL. 

The issues related to Foreign Currency exchange were corrected, however, I am now stuck on how to correct the values of the GR and GI with wrong unit cost need to be corrected. 

I am not sure if I should be going for inventory revaluation or making the reversal entries wherever possible. But the major concern is that the quantity of goods issue or goods receipt is correct.

 

Thank you everyone in advance. #SAPB1

entry.title: SAP B1 SQL Dashboard User name and password not working
entry.content:
Dear all,

When I am trying to login to generate the Dashboard SAP Business SQL then it is not working.

It's showing error like Incorrect Username and Password.

SAP Business One SQL Version,  Dashboard 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Can we edit user defined objects with ui configuration?
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we edit user defined objects with ui configuration? I have too many fields and they look too cluttered. The add and cancel buttons are too low to be visible. How can I edit them?

Can you help me? Thank you, regards.
